events.summary: C4 Phase 0 (Research) opened — 10-section research.md authored covering: problem framing (3 existing observers + sustained-trend gap), trigger algorithm (personal-baseline median ± 1σ + hardFloor=25 + 3-day window + 7-day re-fire), three surfaces (push + Home banner + Why? affordance), distinction from C2 (training-day vs daily, 1-day vs 3-day window), success metrics (4 tiered) + kill criteria (3), dependencies (all shipped), scope-NOT (sleep mirror + composite fusion + predictive overlay deferred to follow-ons), Phase E compliance (no new gates). Branch: feature/trend-alerts-hrv off origin/main 228430a.
